stem: The function g(x) = 350(1.052)x models the value, in dollars, of a certain investment account by the end of each year from 1980 through 2000, where x is the number of years after 1980. Which of the following is the best interpretation of "g(8) is approximately equal to 525" in this context?

answerOptions.content: The value of the account is estimated to be approximately 8 dollars greater in 1988 than in 1980.
The value of the account is estimated to be approximately 8 times greater in 1988 than in 1980.
The value of the account is estimated to be approximately 525 dollars in 1988.
The account value is estimated to increase by approximately 525 dollars every 8 years.

rationale: Choice C is correct. g(x) gives the value x years after 1980, so g(8) ≈ 525 means the estimated value 8 years after 1980 (i.e., in 1988) is approximately $525. Choices A, B, D misinterpret the function.
